x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR VA topics define the conversational use cases Now Assist HRSD can assist employees with. More published HR topics means broader AI-assisted self-service coverage for HR inquiries.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Publish HR VA topics for top HR inquiry categories via sys_cs_topic_list.do. Include topics for benefits questions, leave requests, payroll, and HR policies. Now Assist enhances VA topics with AI-powered intent matching.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c6b
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[HR VA topics define the conversational use cases Now Assist HRSD can assist employees with. More published HR topics means broader AI-assisted self-service coverage for HR inquiries.]]></ai_justification><check_name>HR Virtual Agent Topics</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_topic");
gr.addEncodedQuery("active=true^published=true^topicBlockLIKEHR^ORtopicBlockLIKEHuman Resources");
gr.query();
var n=gr.getRowCount();
return{status:n>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" published active HR VA topics",finding:n<10?"Only "+n+" published HR VA topics. More active HR topics means broader Now Assist HRSD AI-assisted self-service coverage for employee HR inquiries.":""+n+" published HR VA topics -- good coverage for Now Assist HRSD conversational AI."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HRSD</module><number>CHK0000408</number><order>160</order><remediation_guidance>Publish HR VA topics for top HR inquiry categories via sys_cs_topic_list.do. Include topics for benefits questions, leave requests, payroll, and HR policies. Now Assist enhances VA topics with AI-powered intent matching.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>c3f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c6b</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>HR Virtual Agent Topics</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c6b</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
